usgs-mineral-data.description: USGS Mineral Resources Data System — geological data, commodity statistics, deposit databases.

lme-metals.description: London Metal Exchange — base metals pricing (Cu, Al, Zn, Ni, Pb, Sn).

kitco-precious.description: Kitco — precious metals pricing and charts (Au, Ag, Pt, Pd).

sp-global-mining.description: S&P Global Market Intelligence — mining company data, project databases. Requires subscription.

mining-com.description: Mining.com — mining industry news, project data, commodity updates.

sec-edgar.description: SEC EDGAR — US mining company filings (10-K, 10-Q, 8-K, technical reports).

asx-announcements.description: ASX — Australian mining company announcements and disclosures.

infomine.description: Mining Intelligence / InfoMine — cost data, benchmarks, mine-site databases. Requires subscription.
